NOT REPORTED.(506)

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT RESPONDENT FUENTES, IRMA RECOVER FROM APPELLANT BEST BUY - CLIFF CHANG PAC SALES MANAGER $8,748.01 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $8,823.01, TERMS AND CONDITIONS STATE "IF YOU PREFER, YOU CAN MAKE AN EXCHANGE FOR THE SAME ITEM"- NO PRICE LANGUAGE INCLUDED. RECORD REMANDED TO SMALL CLAIMS (PLAINTIFF/DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETURNED TO SMALL CLAIMS DIVISION)

calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Jan-09-2020 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Attorney Michelle C. Golden for Appellant, Defendant Best Buy the moving party. Represented by Cliff Chang Pac, Sales Manager.
Respondent, Plaintiff Irma Fuentes the opposing party.

This cause comes on regularly for trial de novo. All parties are sworn.

Attorney Michelle C. Golden for Appellant, Defendant Best Buy the moving party. Represented by Cliff Chang Pac, Sales Manager. testifies on behalf of Best Buy. The following evidence is submitted:
#1:Duplicate Reciepts 9 & 10.
Attorney Michelle C. Golden examines Respondent Irma Fuentes.
Attorney Michelle C. Golden examines Appellant Cliff Chang Pac, Sales Manager.

Respondent, Plaintiff Irma Fuentes testifies on her own behalf. The following evidence is submitted:
A:Invoice(Contractor Bernardo Martinez) and Airport Appliance Printout.

At the conclusion of the case, the matter is taken under submission.
Judge Pro Tem Elliott Myles, Clerk A. Datt, Not Recorded.(525)

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Oct-29-2019 Judgment Entered
